text: "By them."... The tongue and the lips, mentioned in the last verse of the foregoing chapter.

"That they spare me not in their ignorances."... That is, that the scourges and discipline of wisdom may restrain the ignorances, that is, the slips and offences which are usually committed by the tongue and the lips.
"Who first hath perfect knowledge of her"... Christ was the first that had perfect knowledge of heavenly wisdom.
